title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers outlines five techniques to prevent AI agent hallucinations and reduce token waste: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for verifiable structured queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails coded in Python, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demonstrations use a travel agent built with Strands Agents framework and show integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore at scale.
